# Reflections of Eternity
## Scripture
> "Before the mountains were born or you brought forth the whole world, from everlasting to everlasting you are God." - Psalm 90:2

## Reflection
As we gaze up at the night sky, we are reminded of the vast expanse of God's creation. The stars, planets, and galaxies stretch out before us like a canvas of wonder. Yet, amidst this grandeur, we find a profound truth: God's eternity is not bound by the limits of time and space. Before the mountains were formed or the world was created, God existed, and He will continue to exist long after the universe has passed away. This reality invites us to reflect on our own place within the grand tapestry of God's plan. Our lives, though brief and fleeting, are not without purpose. We are part of a larger story that stretches from eternity past to eternity future.

## Prayer
Dear Heavenly Father, as we contemplate the vastness of Your creation, we are humbled by the realization of Your eternal nature. Help us to live with an eternal perspective, keeping our eyes fixed on You and Your purposes. May our brief journey on this earth be filled with purpose and meaning, as we reflect Your glory and love to a world in need. Thank You for being our Rock, our Refuge, and our Eternal God. Amen.
